articles.title: The Iran crisis has not yet peaked
articles.body: The war is currently more likely to escalate than to be resolved by negotiation

articles.title: Kevin Warsh to say Fed independence not threatened by political pressure
articles.body: Donald Trump’s pick for chair will tell powerful Senate committee that central bank must ‘stay in its lane’

articles.title: Kevin Warsh: Trump’s next fall guy at the Fed?
articles.body: The nominee to lead the world’s most powerful central bank wants big changes. But there’s risk of confrontation with the president over interest rates
